full_content:
Dear Savana Support Team,

I am writing to raise a concern regarding my returned order and pending refund.

I had placed an order for tops from Savana, out of which I returned 2 tops. The return parcel was picked up by the delivery partner on 15th May (Friday). However, I do not know the name of the delivery person who collected the parcel.

After the pickup, I received a call stating that approval for the return was required because the return request had been rejected from Savana’s side. I then contacted Savana support and received the required approval for the return.

Despite this, it has now been more than one week, and I have still not received my refund. There is also no update or proper return status showing in the app.

I request you to please:
	•	Check which delivery partner or executive collected my return parcel.
	•	Verify the return status from your end.
	•	Process my refund as soon as possible.
